Additionally, left-wing ideologies often focus on equitable distribution of resources. High unemployment can exacerbate inequality, whereas controlling inflation without addressing unemployment might not tackle the root causes of economic disparity. 

Therefore, the statement that inflation control is more important than unemployment would likely be opposed by a left-wing stance. The left would probably prioritize unemployment control over inflation, especially in situations where policies to control inflation might worsen unemployment.
